name: @platform/contracts-admin
description: Tenant administration contract package: members, features, auth-settings, and per-tenant authentication provider config schemas shared by the BFF and React control plane.

readme.summary: Tenant administration contract package: members, features, auth-settings, and per-tenant authentication provider config schemas shared by the BFF and React control plane.
responsibilities: Own member management schemas: MemberSummary, MemberListResponse, InviteMemberRequest, UpdateMemberRoleRequest
Own feature-flag schemas: FeatureSummary, FeatureListResponse, ToggleFeatureRequest
Own auth-settings read shapes the admin UI consumes: IdpSummary, MfaPolicy, SessionPolicy
Own per-tenant authentication provider config schemas: TenantAuthProvidersConfig and update/response shapes (ADR-0037)
nonResponsibilities: Does not implement member, feature, or auth-settings persistence or Keycloak access
Does not import React or any framework-specific packages
Does not own session, permission resolution, or audit logic
usage: Imported by application and platform packages that need admin contract types
Used at the BFF boundary to validate admin mutation bodies and by the React control plane to type its REST clients
operationalNotes: All schemas use Zod for runtime validation
Zero @platform/* dependencies — this is a pure contract package
Role and provider-id literals must stay in lock-step with @platform/domain-identity and the BFF auth-providers module
